title: Measure personal-ledger performance
preconditions: Release binary, production SQLite settings, 100000 active transactions with realistic accounts, allocations, relationships, and filters.
steps: Warm according to the benchmark protocol; measure repeated filtered actuals first page plus full-set totals and ordinary single-entity writes; report p50/p95 and environment.
expected: Actuals first page and full totals complete below 2 seconds p95; ordinary writes below 1 second p95; exact results remain correct.
